title: Project
description: Represents a Bugsnag project, which corresponds to an individual application being monitored.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

organization_id.description: The identifier of the organization this project belongs to.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the project.

api_key.description: The API key used by notifier SDKs to report errors for this project.

type.description: The platform type of the project (e.g., rails, js, android).

is_full_view.description: Whether the current user has full view access to this project.

release_stages.description: The list of release stages configured for this project.

language.description: The primary programming language of the project.

created_at.description: The date and time the project was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the project was last updated.

errors_url.description: The API URL to list errors for this project.

events_url.description: The API URL to list events for this project.

html_url.description: The URL to the project on the Bugsnag dashboard.

url.description: The API URL for this project resource.

open_error_count.description: The number of currently open errors in this project.

collaborators_count.description: The number of collaborators on this project.

global_grouping.description: The global grouping rules applied to errors in this project.

location_grouping.description: The location-based grouping rules for this project.

discarded_app_versions.description: Application versions for which errors are discarded.

discarded_errors.description: Error classes that are discarded and not stored.

custom_event_fields_used.description: The number of custom event fields in use.
